overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 exploring a sunlit futuristic urban shantytown. The player walks through curved concrete architecture, past vending machines and market stalls, and through a vehicle parking area with abandoned trucks. The environment features a mix of high-tech buildings and decayed infrastructure with sparse vegetation.

agents.ego_description: walking around a curved building structure covered in vines, passing white benches and a phone booth

entered.detail: rounded building facade with overgrown vines and graffiti on the lower level
wide staircase with white railings leading upward
concrete bench covered in colorful graffiti and stickers
futuristic phone booth with teal and orange accents
tall palm tree against the blue sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a sunlit concrete plaza with a distinctive curved building covered in vegetation on the left. The camera moves forward past graffiti-covered benches and a futuristic phone booth, with wide stairs visible ahead. The environment is empty of people, with dry grass growing between concrete slabs.

events.description: begins ascending concrete stairs toward upper level

agents.ego_description: walking past vending machines and ascending stairs to a higher elevation

entered.detail: red automated vending machine with yellow warning triangles
blue and yellow vending machine with digital display

segments.scene_description: Moving through a narrower passage between structures, the camera passes a red vending machine and graffiti-covered benches. The environment transitions from the open plaza to a more enclosed walkway before ascending a flight of concrete stairs toward an upper level.

scene_state.functional_zone: open market area with futuristic stalls

agents.ego_description: walking through a market area with futuristic stalls and neon lighting

entered.detail: futuristic market stall with curved blue roof and purple neon lighting underneath
large white outdoor air conditioning unit
wooden crates and cardboard boxes stacked near the stall
elevated pedestrian walkway or highway overpass

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto an upper level, the scene opens into a market area with futuristic stalls featuring blue neon lighting. A vendor stands at a stall ahead while the camera moves past stacked crates and air conditioning units. Elevated highway structures and distant skyscrapers become visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with parked vehicles and city views

events.description: approaches two seated individuals on concrete ledge

agents.ego_description: walking along an elevated walkway past parked vehicles and seated individuals

notable_agents.action: two people sitting on concrete ledge, one with red hair and goggles looking toward camera

large concrete overpass with metal railings

segments.scene_description: Walking along an elevated concrete walkway, the camera passes a parked blue van on the left and approaches two individuals sitting on a ledge to the right. Futuristic skyscrapers rise in the distance beyond construction cranes, while concrete barriers line the edge of the walkway.

agents.ego_description: walking through a parking area with abandoned military and civilian vehicles

entered.detail: large olive drab military transport truck with multiple axles
abandoned red pickup truck with rust
road surface covered in colorful graffiti and tire marks

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through an open parking area with abandoned vehicles including a large military truck and rusted cars. The ground transitions to asphalt covered in graffiti, with futuristic buildings and construction cranes visible in the background under a clear blue sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit urban shantytown that transitions from a quiet concrete plaza into a bustling elevated market and finally an abandoned parking lot. It begins in an open plaza beside a curved, vegetation-covered building, moving past graffiti-covered benches and a futuristic phone booth toward a set of wide stairs. As the camera passes through a narrower walkway and a red vending machine, it ascends the stairs to emerge into a market area filled with blue neon stalls, stacked crates, and a distant view of skyscrapers. The scene then shifts along an elevated concrete walkway past a parked blue van and seated figures, with construction cranes framing the horizon. Finally, the path opens into a wide asphalt parking area cluttered with rusted cars and a large military truck under a clear blue sky.
